Translation.Description: This high-quality staff is made of a Lightning Stone which has been fastened to the tip of a sturdy shaft. Each blow will leave your enemies dazed and confused amidst deafening electrical shocks.
Translation.Provides: Melee attacks have a 25% chance to Daze the victim and cause them to miss their next action
Shocked enemies have a 50% chance to swing at a random unit in mêlée instead of their target
